title: Regarding Shinji and Kaworu
wikitext:
[]: Regarding Shinji and Kaworu             Quote Post by RubberSoul » Fri Jul 23, 2004 5:39 am Well, somebody was gonna do it sooner or later. Here's my view on the whole thing: I honestly think they aren't gay at all. I think he loved Shinji like someone who loves a friend. I think Kaworu didn't realize the social implications of what he said to Shinji and he probably didn't know about the different types of love people can have for each other (platonic love and non-platonic love). He just straight-out told Shinji he loved him. Another thing, I think in Japan males are much more affectionate towards each other and just regard it as normal behavior. In the United States affecionate gestures, such as hugging, between males is often thought of as "gay".

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Fri Jul 23, 2004 8:05 am The answer is quite simple really! Kaworu was trying to fatten Shinji up so he could eat him! :shock:

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Fri Jul 23, 2004 8:09 am Also, Another thing, I think in Japan males are much more affectionate towards each other and just regard it as normal behavior. In the United States affecionate gestures, such as hugging, between males is often thought of as "gay".

[]: Re: Regarding Shinji and Kaworu             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Fri Jul 23, 2004 8:11 am RubberSoul wrote: Well, somebody was gonna do it sooner or later. Here's my view on the whole thing: I honestly think they aren't gay at all. I think he loved Shinji like someone who loves a friend. I think Kaworu didn't realize the social implications of what he said to Shinji and he probably didn't know about the different types of love people can have for each other (platonic love and non-platonic love). He just straight-out told Shinji he loved him.

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Fri Jul 23, 2004 10:43 am You have to think about this: Kaworu and Rei are the same, they look the same, they both have angelic nature, but they are the exact oposite in human relationships. Rei is not too friendly, she doesn't know how to show feelings, but Kaworu is full of wisdom and knows what people feels very well. He saw the troubles of Shinji, and gave him what Shinji needed, a friend, and the care and love that no one has ever give to Shinji. Of course, Kaworu maybe doesn't act normaly, but he has never being an homosexual.

[]:             Quote Post by KaworuNagisa17 » Wed Aug 04, 2004 10:18 pm Shinji was definitely more in love w/ Kaworu than Kaworu was w/ Shinji. Of course, this is because Shinji had no one left. I do agree that it was platonic, tho. If they ever went anywhere shounen-ai-wise, I'd say it'd be simple cuddles. Nevertheless, Shinji/Kaworu is one of my favorite couples. They're a nice tradegy that was handled beautifully by Anno & Gainax.

[]:             Quote Post by houtaru » Wed Aug 04, 2004 10:48 pm I'm sure Shinji's not gay, but whether Kaworu is or not is beside the point. I may be wrong, but I thought that Kaworu was just 'attaching' himself to Shinji because he is an Eva pilot. I thought he said 'I love you' not because he actually meant it, but because he was taking advantage of Shinji's lonliness. He is the enemy after all. I think he intended on betraying Shinji from the very begining. He didn't exactly stop when Shinji yelled at him. Kaworu didn't seem like he loved Shinji there to me. So I guess seeing Lilith changed his mind about destroying the world and Shinji with it? Maybe he understood what makes humans tick, or maybe he actually felt something for him as a human being towards the end. I think Shinji killed him not because of his duty, but because he knew Kaworu was taking advantage of him, and betrayed him, Shinji wanted to cut his head off - he wanted to kill him . Then, of course, in true Shinji fashion, felt guilty about it afterwards because he needs love so bad.

[]:             Quote Post by Karma Burn » Wed Aug 04, 2004 11:11 pm At that point I believe Shinji was mentally destroyed that the last thing on his mind was a getting some from an andyrogenous pretty boy.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Thu Aug 05, 2004 8:59 am Yea, Kawrou was never gay. He was, as many others have said, very affectionate and showed his feelings without hesitation. And you also have to remember he was trying to get as close as as possible to Shinji as his mission so that would explain a lot too.

[]:             Quote Post by Karma Burn » Thu Aug 05, 2004 10:19 am Yea, Kawrou was never gay

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Thu Aug 05, 2004 10:44 am Karma Burn wrote: I'm sure that revelation will come as a shock to many fan girls.

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Thu Aug 05, 2004 10:46 am Yea, Kawrou was never gay

[]:             Quote Post by Karma Burn » Thu Aug 05, 2004 2:07 pm Karma Burn wrote: I'm sure that revelation will come as a shock to many fan girls. What do you mean?

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Thu Aug 05, 2004 9:06 pm That why its called a forum , :roll: .

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Thu Aug 05, 2004 9:25 pm Kaworu is not gay. End of story. Girlfriend of Steel 2 was just a stupid dating sim game made so Gainax could make more money.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Thu Aug 05, 2004 9:45 pm An excellent point............ But it dosn't chang the fact that that little scene scared me for life........ I've kind of had a grudge against Karwou since then though.....

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Thu Aug 05, 2004 9:49 pm coff wrote: Kaworu is not gay. End of story. Girlfriend of Steel 2 was just a stupid dating sim game made so Gainax could make more money.

[]:             Quote Post by Karma Burn » Thu Aug 05, 2004 9:58 pm I was simply saying that Gainax seems to care nothing of its characters, because they're willing to bend the characters' wills to meet that of the fans' wishes

[]:             Quote Post by Cyanna » Thu Aug 05, 2004 10:32 pm Nephilim wrote: You have to think about this: Kaworu and Rei are the same, they look the same, they both have angelic nature, but they are the exact oposite in human relationships. Rei is not too friendly, she doesn't know how to show feelings, but Kaworu is full of wisdom and knows what people feels very well. He saw the troubles of Shinji, and gave him what Shinji needed, a friend, and the care and love that no one has ever give to Shinji. Of course, Kaworu maybe doesn't act normaly, but he has never being an homosexual.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Aug 05, 2004 10:45 pm However, They noticed people very rarely hugged or held hands...even if they were siblings!
